items.title: Google DeepMind releases Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6
items.author: www.testingcatalog.com
items.snippet: Google AI and Google DeepMind made several significant announcements in April 2026. The most notable was the unveiling of Genie 3, a general-purpose world model that can generate dynamic, interactive 3D environments from a single text prompt. Building on previous Genie releases, it allows real-time user interaction while improving consistency and realism. Google also released Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6, an enhanced embodied reasoning model that enables robots to perform physical tasks with greater p

items.title: Changelog April 2026 - Gemini API Google AI Developers Forum
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet:
The Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026. In April 2026, Google launched Gemma 4 models (gemma-4-26b-a4b-it and gemma-4-31b-it) available via AI Studio and the Gemini API, along with new Flex and Priority inference tiers for cost/latency optimization. File handling was enhanced with Cloud Storage bucket support and public/private DB pre-signed URLs, increasing the file size limit from 20MB to 100MB. Billing tier updates and usage caps also took effect in April 2026.

On the mode

items.title: The Architecture of Vibe Coding: A Deep Dive into Google AI Studio Build Mode
items.author: medium.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio launched a full-stack vibe coding experience in early 2026, representing a major leap beyond simple frontend prototyping. The platform can now take a plain English prompt and generate a production-ready full-stack application with a React frontend, Node.js backend, Firebase database/authentication, and Cloud Run deployment — all wired together automatically. The feature was officially announced via Google's blog and developer documentation at ai.google.dev, with dedicated docs c

items.title: Firebase Documentation
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Firebase Studio is Google's agentic, cloud-based development environment that integrates Gemini AI assistance for building full-stack apps including games. It unifies the former Project IDX with AI agents and offers two main workflows: an App Prototyping agent for no-code, prompt-driven prototyping, and a direct Code OSS-based IDE for traditional development. Games can be generated using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS — for example, the official codelab walks through building a sliding number puzzle

items.title: gemini-cli/docs/releases.md at main
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: The google-gemini GitHub organization (github.com/google-gemini) is actively maintained with frequent releases across several repositories. The most active project is gemini-cli — an open-source AI agent that brings Gemini directly into the terminal. As of April 2026, it is publishing nightly builds (e.g., v0.40.0-nightly.20260414) every day at UTC 00:00 from the main branch, and weekly preview releases (e.g., v0.36.0-preview.8) on Tuesdays at UTC 23:59. The organization's cookbook and workshops

items.title: Gmail launches AI features made possible by Gemini 3
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet:
Google has been actively releasing Gemini AI updates through early 2026. The most significant model announcement is Gemini 3.1 Pro, building on the Gemini 3 foundation with enhanced capabilities for science and engineering tasks. Gemini 3 itself also powered major product integrations, including a new Gmail 'Gemini era' rollout featuring AI Overviews and expanded AI features across the inbox.

On the app and product side, Google's monthly 'Gemini Drops' series has brought steady feature releases

items.title: Service disruption regarding the Google Antigravity IDE - Google AI Developers Forum
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Google Antigravity is Google's agentic development platform that combines an AI-powered IDE with an agent-first interface, enabling developers to deploy agents that autonomously plan, execute, and verify complex tasks across the editor, terminal, and browser. The platform features an Editor View with tab completions and inline commands, a Manager Surface for spawning and orchestrating multiple agents across workspaces, and an Artifacts system that generates tangible deliverables (task plans, scr
